title: OreMiner
description: This will be help your ores mining!!!
body:
# Notice

**This mod is no longer actively maintained.

For the same type of vein mining feature, please use [OmniMiner](https://modrinth.com/mod/omniminer-with-bedrock-edition) instead.  
OmniMiner is the recommended replacement for OreMiner.


Please use [OmniMiner](https://modrinth.com/mod/omniminer-with-bedrock-edition) instead.  
It works in the same way as OreMiner and is the recommended replacement.**


## OreMiner

OreMiner is a simple vein mining mod for Fabric.

It lets you mine connected ore blocks at once while holding a key, with optional block outlines, auto collection, and configurable mining behavior.

## Features

- Mine connected ore veins with one block break
- Configurable max vein size
- Optional diagonal search
- Hold mode or toggle mode
- Block outline preview
- Optional auto item and XP collection
- Config screen with Mod Menu / Cloth Config

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.10
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
- Cloth Config
- Mod Menu recommended

## Credits

Inspired by [Liteminer](https://modrinth.com/mod/liteminer).
